arguments.template: {{ description }}
{{ description }}

<gl-shared-component-input-autocomplete-simple
  [class]="class"
  [value]="value"
  [listName]="listName"
  (currentValue)="onCurrentValue($event)"
  [id]="id"
  [itemContentAlignment]="itemContentAlignment"
  [placeholder]="placeholder"
  [listItems]="listItems"
  [disabled]="disabled"

  [custom]="custom"
  [baseUrl]="baseUrl"
  [valueField]="valueField"
  [textField]="textField">
  <gl-shared-component-title-label-simple
    [id]="id"
    [labelAlignment]="labelAlignment"
    [labelValue]="labelValue"
    [required]="required"
    [class]="class"
    [requiredLabel]="requiredField"
  ></gl-shared-component-title-label-simple>
</gl-shared-component-input-autocomplete-simple>
{{option.text}}

arguments.template:
<!--suppress HtmlFormInputWithoutLabel -->
<input
  #inputElement
  class="item-content {{ itemContentAlignment }} {{ class }}"
  type="text"
  [id]="id"
  [value]="value"
  [autocomplete]="'off'"
  required
  [placeholder]="placeholder"
  (keyup)="onKeyUp($event)"
  [disabled]="disabled"
  [maxLength]="maxLength">

<gl-shared-component-input-text-area-simple
  [class]="class"
  [id]="id"
  [placeholder]="placeholder"
  [itemContentAlignment]="itemContentAlignment"
  (currentValue)="onKeyUp($event)"
  [value]="value"
  [disabled]="disabled"
  [maxLength]="maxLength">
  <gl-shared-component-title-label-simple
    [class]="class"
    [labelAlignment]="labelAlignment"
    [id]="id"
    [labelValue]="labelValue"
    [required]="required"
    [requiredLabel]="requiredLabel"
  ></gl-shared-component-title-label-simple>
</gl-shared-component-input-text-area-simple>

• {{ content }} {{ content }}
